directions.observed: front-facing body with head strongly tilted upward
directions.reason: Upward gaze is unambiguous and establishes the ring start.

directions.observed: head remains high and begins turning toward screen-right
directions.reason: Ordered interpolation from 000 toward 045 is coherent.
Head yaw and facial placement match the diagonal expectation.

directions.observed: near-profile rightward turn with a still-elevated face
directions.reason: Credible bridge between 045 and the 090 cardinal.
The right cardinal is immediately distinguishable.

directions.observed: right profile with the chin beginning to lower
directions.reason: Head pitch progresses naturally away from 090.

directions.observed: three-quarter right orientation with visibly lowered head

directions.reason: Direction is correct; the next step into 180 has a larger yaw and center change than neighboring steps.

directions.observed: front-facing body and head bowed centrally downward
directions.reason: The down cardinal is clear; entry from 157.5 is somewhat abrupt but visually acceptable.

directions.observed: bowed head starts rotating toward screen-left
directions.reason: Coherent transition from central down to leftward diagonals.
Diagonal direction is readable and identity remains stable.

directions.observed: left-biased near-profile with head still slightly lowered

directions.reason: The left cardinal is immediately distinguishable.

directions.observed: left profile with chin and face beginning to lift
directions.reason: Correctly begins the upward arc after 270; subtle vertical contrast remains readable in the ordered loop.
Diagonal semantics and ordered interpolation are clear.

directions.observed: strong upward-left pose immediately before the front-up frame
directions.reason: Direction is correct; closure to 000 has a noticeable area and pose jump but remains acceptable at normal pet size.

accepted_warnings: 157.5 to 180 has a larger than neighboring visual transition but no direction or identity error.
337.5 to 000 has a noticeable area and pose reset but remains a readable loop closure.
Blind pair vertical-7 was ambiguous to two reviewers; labeled ordered-loop review confirms 292.5 begins the up-left arc and 247.5 remains down-left approaching left.
